story.text: The narrative blog series is published live in the **[Privacy is Value](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** Substack collection at **[sync.soulbis.com](https://sync.soulbis.com)** — read it there. This page is a forward-linking index: a one-line summary of each post and a link out to the live site. The full text is not reproduced here (it lives at its canonical home).

- **[The Myth Before the Math](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — ## Why Every New System Begins as a Story
- **[Privacy is Value: V5 — Forming Constellations](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — *A research letter from the journey. (⚔️ ⊥ ⿻ ⊥ 🧙) 😊*
- **[Privacy is Value: V5 — The Forge and the Ceremony](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — *A research letter from the journey. (⚔️ ⊥ ⿻ ⊥ 🧙) 😊*
- **[Privacy is Value: V5 — Part 3](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — ## The Dragon Wakes
- **[Privacy is Value: V5 — Part 4](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — ## The Dihedral Mirror
- **[Privacy is Value: Part 5 — The First Agent We Forgo(t)](https://sync.soulbis.com/s/privacy-is-value)** — *The hidden act. The one I didn't tell you about at the start.*

---
